title: Admin
subtitle: Site-owner tools — changes on this page apply system-wide, across every club and tournament.
qrLogoDesc: Applied to every club's number-generated PromptPay QR
qrLogoNavDesc: The logo embedded at the centre of every club's PromptPay QR
uploadInvalid: File must be a PNG/JPG/WebP image under 1MB
disabledHint: Off — QR will have no centre logo

levels.title: Global skill levels (site-wide)
levels.description: The default level set new clubs are seeded with, and the fallback for tournaments
levels.impactNote: Editing here affects new clubs + clubs that haven't customized their set — customized clubs are unaffected
levels.navDesc: The default level set new clubs are seeded with
levels.addPlaceholder: Level name e.g. P, S, N
levels.validationReal: Numeric value must be a number
levels.deleteWarning: Deleting a global level nulls the level of players in clubs using the global set (customized clubs unaffected)

botMessages.title: LINE bot messages
botMessages.description: Edit the bot's automatic replies and notifications. Leave a field blank to use the built-in default; the braced placeholders are filled in when the message is sent.
botMessages.navDesc: Edit every automatic reply/notification text the bot sends

label.bindConflictGroup: Group already bound to another club
label.bindConflictSeries: Club already bound to another group
label.adminUnbindNotice: Notice to the club owner after a site admin unbinds the LINE group

lineBindings.title: LINE group bindings (all clubs)
lineBindings.description: Every club currently bound to a LINE group — unbind one at a time or all at once. Owners always get a LINE notice.
lineBindings.navDesc: View or unbind every club's LINE group connection
lineBindings.countLabel: {count} club(s) bound to a LINE group
lineBindings.legacyBadgeTooltip: Bound at the old per-session level, not yet migrated to the club series
lineBindings.empty: No clubs are bound to a LINE group
lineBindings.unbindConfirmDesc: "{club}"'s group billing/notifications will stop working until it's rebound — the owner will get a LINE notice.
lineBindings.unbindAllTooltip: Unbind every club's LINE group at once
lineBindings.unbindAllConfirmDesc: This will unbind the LINE group for all {count} club(s) — their group billing/notifications will stop working until rebound. Each owner will get a LINE notice.
